IP.subagent_1: the balance comprised warehouse buildings and land use rights held for logistics leasing in Shanghai. Tax payable.subagent_1: the balance comprised accrued real estate tax (RET) and land use tax (LUT). The adjusted balance was CNY223,320, CNY228,603 and CNY582,979 as at FY20, FY21 and 9M22 respectively. The 9M22 increase reflected higher RET accruals following a property tax base reassessment. All obligations were current with no overdue amounts identified. The FY21 balance was marginally higher reflecting an updated assessment base. The material 9M22 increase was driven by a full-year RET accrual on the revised property value.

__BS_summary__: Key balance sheet items reflect an operational logistics warehouse business in Shanghai. Investment properties of CNY41.6 million (FY20: CNY45.5 million) represent the primary asset, depreciated over 20 years. Working capital includes other payables of CNY9.2 million (mainly tenant deposits and Company AO funding) and input VAT credits of CNY15,707 at 9M22. Paid-in capital of CNY128.0 million from Company A and Company WW provides the equity base. Related-party balances have been removed as indicative adjustments throughout.
__IS_summary__: Revenue grew from CNY1.4 million in FY20 to CNY2.2 million in FY21 and 9M22, driven by logistics service income and warehouse rental. Operating costs (primarily depreciation of CNY4.8-5.7 million per year) persistently exceeded revenue, resulting in a gross loss in each period. RET and LUT of CNY0.3-0.5 million per year are the main below-the-line charges. Net financial income in FY20-FY21 reversed to a CNY58,000 net expense in 9M22 due to financing costs on the Company AO funding arrangement.
